ChallengeDescription.title: ChallengeDescription
ChallengeDescription.description: Long text field describing the challenge

ChallengeEndDate.title: ChallengeEndDate
ChallengeEndDate.description: Date field defining the end of the challenge

ChallengeID.title: ChallengeID
ChallengeID.description: ID of the Challenge in case of Update

ChallengeName.title: ChallengeName
ChallengeName.description: Text field defining the Name of the Challenge

ChallengeResults.title: ChallengeResults
ChallengeResults.description: Text field describing the results of the challenge once it is closed

ChallengeSlackChannel.title: ChallengeSlackChannel
ChallengeSlackChannel.description: Text field defining Id of the Slack Channel created for the challenge

ChallengeStartDate.title: ChallengeStartDate
ChallengeStartDate.description: Date field defining the start of the challenge

ChallengeType.title: ChallengeType
ChallengeType.description:
Picklist field with the value
Team, Personal

ManagerId.title: ManagerId
ManagerId.description: Lookup field to User defining the manager responsible of the challenge

Participants.title: Participants
Participants.description: Text field, defining the challenge's participants. It can be user Full Name or Role
